scripts.build: vitest run && next build && pnpm copy-assets && pnpm prepare-tauri-dist
scripts.copy-assets: node -e "const {existsSync, mkdirSync, cpSync, rmSync} = require('fs'); const out='.next/standalone/.next'; if(!existsSync(out+'/static'))mkdirSync(out+'/static',{recursive:true}); cpSync('public','.next/standalone/public',{recursive:true}); cpSync('.next/static',out+'/static',{recursive:true});"
scripts.prepare-tauri-dist: node -e "const {writeFileSync, mkdirSync, existsSync} = require('fs'); mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true}); writeFileSync('dist/index.html','<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta http-equiv=\'refresh\' content=\'0;url=http://localhost:3000\'></head></html>');"
